headline: The Hartford And Active Minds Extend Collaboration To Support Student Mental Health Nationwide
summary: HARTFORD, Conn., March 16, 2026--To support students’ mental health, The Hartford renewed its support of Active Minds' traveling mental health exhibit called Send Silence Packing.
